title: ipomoea pilosa
intro: Ipomoea pilosa, also known as naked convolvulus or Chinese moonseed, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Ipomoea pilosa include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and treating various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as tea, decoctions, and ointments, which are often consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
